server.name: hsbc-commerce-dsp-mcp
server.description: MCP tool layer provided by HSBC developers for ChatGPT shopping, travel, Open Banking consent, and HSBC DSP Authorization Agent payment journeys.

tools.name: hsbc_create_consent_link
tools.description: Use when the user asks to bind or connect HSBC. Creates an HSBC app authorization link for consent and OAuth token issuance.

tools.name: commerce_search_coffee
tools.description: Use when the user wants coffee, mentions tiredness, caffeine, nearby cafes, Starbucks, Luckin, or asks for a drink recommendation.

tools.name: commerce_create_coffee_order
tools.description: Use after the user selects a shop and menu item. Creates an unpaid coffee order card.

tools.name: travel_search_hotels
tools.description: Use when the user wants to book a hotel, stay overnight, find accommodation, or compare rooms.

tools.name: travel_create_hotel_booking
tools.description: Use after the user selects a hotel and room. Creates an unpaid booking hold.

tools.name: travel_search_flights
tools.description: Use when the user wants to book or search flights, airfare, airline tickets, or travel between cities.

tools.name: travel_create_flight_booking
tools.description: Use after the user selects a flight itinerary. Creates an unpaid flight booking hold.

tools.name: hsbc_create_payment_quote
tools.description: Use after an unpaid order or booking exists and before final payment confirmation.

tools.name: hsbc_dsp_authorize_payment
tools.description: Use after the user explicitly confirms payment. Calls HSBC DSP Authorization Agent to evaluate risk, bind the payment quote to the user, and return a DSP authorization reference. Biometric verification may be required before this tool returns approved.

biometricAssertion.description: Signed assertion from the trusted facial verification boundary.

tools.name: hsbc_submit_payment
tools.description: Use only after HSBC DSP Authorization Agent approves the payment and returns a dspAuthorizationId.
